title: Intellia Therapeutics (NTLA) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Can the Stock Move Higher?
text: Intellia Therapeutics is anticipated to deliver improved earnings while experiencing a revenue decline in its Q1 2026 results. The company projects a quarterly loss of $0.92 per share, representing a 16.4% year-over-year improvement, though revenues are expected to decrease 6.6% to $15.53 million. Analysts have revised consensus estimates upward by 5.31% over the past month, suggesting growing confidence. The Earnings ESP (Expected Surprise Prediction) metric registers at +6.14%, indicating the Most Accurate Estimate exceeds the Zacks Consensus Estimate. In the previous quarter, the company delivered a 16.16% positive surprise, beating expectations of a $0.99 loss with an actual $0.83 loss. Over the last four quarters, Intellia has consistently beaten consensus EPS estimates. With a Zacks Rank of #3 combined with the positive ESP reading, analysis suggests that Intellia Therapeutics will most likely beat the consensus EPS estimate. However, investors should recognize that earnings beats don't guarantee stock price appreciation.
